Notes: Focused review: pdfe renders all expected content, but the architectural raster linework remains greener than Ghostscript/MuPDF.

Target.Reason: Ghostscript preserves the architectural linework as grayscale while keeping the colored safety overlays; pdfe still renders this linework with an excessive green cast.

1.QualityReason: pdfe renders the full drawing and annotations, but linework color fidelity is below the Ghostscript target and remains an improvement candidate.
1.Notes: Reviewed against current pdfe, MuPDF, Cairo, and Ghostscript renders; do not count as pixel-perfect or accepted-reference match.
